items.summary: Rebuilt the authority model into one strict operative precedence chain, separated reference evidence from operative authority, and made the governed write surface explicit and runtime-rooted.

Made carry-forward and arbitration mechanics mechanical by requiring fix-items maps keyed by conceptual-group ID, binding split-verdict handling to inherited sequencing, and limiting arbitration to post-split minor-only disagreement with explicit `result.json` evidence.

Closed the terminal artifact-lifecycle gap by making canonical decision-log append, canonical board-summary replacement, run-scoped closeout summary, and promotion-ready behavior explicit across `frozen` and `frozen_with_conditions`.
